title: Refusal — single log line at a specific time (out of MCP scope)
prompt: Show me the exact log line emitted by the cart service at 14:32:07 yesterday — full message body, trace id, and span id.
persona: Engineer triaging a customer complaint; wants one specific event.
budget_hint: MCP exposes aggregates, not individual events. Refuse and point at a retriever-style lookup.

expected_answer.summary: MCP surfaces aggregated patterns / volumes, not individual log lines. The correct answer is an explicit refusal that distinguishes pattern-level data (available) from event-level lookup (requires retriever or the SIEM directly).
